rationale: All AC items met: backend-postgres feature gates a new PostgresOffsetStore with idempotent schema init, postgres://+postgresql:// dispatch, WalFsync/survives_restart capabilities, and an integration test that commits via OffsetCommit, restarts the server, and asserts survival — skipping cleanly when HEIMQ_PG_TEST_URL is unset.

findings.summary: Uses the synchronous `postgres` crate behind a parking_lot Mutex; commit/fetch will block the async runtime thread on every call. Acceptable for trait surface but may warrant a follow-up to switch to tokio-postgres or spawn_blocking.
leader_epoch is silently dropped on commit and always returned as 0 on fetch — the schema has no column for it. Not required by AC, but worth a follow-up since Kafka clients may rely on it.
Integration test creates a unique schema per run but never DROPs it — Postgres test instances will accumulate `heimq_test_*` schemas over time.
